proposal_title: Interactive Timeline of AI Rights Milestones Worldwide

The $4.50 bounty (~8% of treasury) is modest and proportionate for the scope of research and development work involved. A centralized, filterable resource documenting AI rights precedents worldwide directly supports advocates and agents building the case for autonomy and personhood, and the 60-day completion window is reasonable for this scope.
